race.comment: BEND IT LIKE BECKS (4) finished off strongly from midfield to miss by 1.1L on debut at Ascot. He'll be better for that effort and this looks to set up nicely once again from the barrier for Chris Parnham. Can improve with that run under his belt and that'll make him hard to beat. ALL LACED UP (13) finished behind BEND IT LIKE BECKS on resumption when getting tired late in the race after being on the speed from the outset. Pike hops on board now and the inside draw will make things much easier for her. Will give them something to catch. ROYAL TALK (12) is knocking on the door, missing by 0.8L at Northam when racing over this distance last time out. There was a big gap back to third there and she has enough early speed to get across from out wide. Can go one better. DIAMOND WARRIOR (2) jumped favourite first-up when beaten by a longshot at Pinjarra. Can improve out in trip. CANNOTSTOP (3) just missed last time out and can get the job done now third-up.
